WHERE 
    r.r_name = 'ASIA'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'

sql2:
WITH asia_suppliers AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
    FROM partsupp ps
    JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
    JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE n.n_regionkey IN (SELECT r.r_regionkey FROM region r WHERE r.r_name = 'ASIA')
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
JOIN asia_suppliers asup ON p.p_partkey = asup.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost 
FROM 
    part p

    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_availqty,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supplycost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    pa.total_availqty,
    pa.total_supplycost
FROM
    ps_agg pa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = pa.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_availqty DESC

sql1:
SELECT 
    n.n_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    part p ON ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    o.o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01' 
    AND o.o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
    AND s.s_acctbal > 0
GROUP BY 
    n.n_name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND o_orderdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
),
filtered_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s_suppkey, s_nationkey
    FROM supplier
    WHERE s_acctbal > 0
)
SELECT
    n.n_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
JOIN filtered_suppliers fs ON l.l_suppkey = fs.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN nation n ON fs.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM customer c WHERE c.c_custkey = fo.o_custkey
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM part p WHERE p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
)
GROUP BY
    n.n_name
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue,
    AVG(ps.ps_supplycost) AS avg_supply_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name
ORDER BY

LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH l_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey,
           SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty,
           SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_price,
           COUNT(*) AS l_cnt
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
),
ps_agg AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey,
           AVG(ps_supplycost) AS avg_cost,
           COUNT(*) AS ps_cnt
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    la.sum_qty * pa.ps_cnt AS total_quantity,
    la.sum_price * pa.ps_cnt AS total_revenue,
    pa.avg_cost AS avg_supply_cost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    l_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
JOIN
    ps_agg pa ON p.p_partkey = pa.ps_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

    SELECT p.p_brand,
           (SELECT SUM(l.l_extendedprice)
            FROM lineitem l
            WHERE l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey) AS part_total

WITH agg AS (
    SELECT
        l_partkey,
        SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
        SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_extended_price
    FROM
        lineitem
    GROUP BY
        l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    agg.total_quantity,
    agg.total_extended_price
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    agg ON p.p_partkey = agg.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    agg.total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_brand, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_brand
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH brand_cost AS (
    SELECT 
        p.p_brand,
        ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty AS line_cost
    FROM 
        partsupp ps,
        part p
    WHERE 
        ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
)
SELECT 
    p_brand,
    SUM(line_cost) AS total_cost
FROM 
    brand_cost
GROUP BY 
    p_brand
ORDER BY 
    total_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p_name, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
FROM part
JOIN partsupp ON part.p_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supply AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, SUM(ps_supplycost * ps_availqty) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM partsupp
    GROUP BY ps_partkey
)
SELECT p.p_name, s.total_supply_cost
FROM part p
JOIN supply s ON p.p_partkey = s.ps_partkey
ORDER BY s.total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    s.s_name, 
    SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supply_agg AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_supplycost) AS total_supply_cost
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(sa.total_supply_cost) AS total_supply_cost
FROM
    supply_agg sa
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = sa.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = sa.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_supply_cost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p_brand, COUNT(*) AS parts_count
FROM part
GROUP BY p_brand
ORDER BY parts_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH brand_counts AS (
    SELECT p_brand, COUNT(*) AS parts_count
    FROM part
    GROUP BY p_brand
)
SELECT p_brand, parts_count
FROM brand_counts
ORDER BY parts_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
FROM supplier s
JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY s.s_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
sql2:
WITH supplier_orders AS (
    SELECT s.s_name, o.o_orderkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM partsupp ps
        JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
        JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
        WHERE ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
          AND o.o_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
    )
)
SELECT s.s_name, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count
FROM supplier s
JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY s.s_name
ORDER BY order_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH german_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM nation n
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND n.n_name = 'GERMANY'
    )
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    lineitem l
    JOIN german_suppliers gs ON l.l_suppkey = gs.s_suppkey
    JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
WHERE
    l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:

JOIN

sql2:

sql1:
SELECT p_name, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM part
JOIN lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_revenue AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey

SELECT p_name, pr.total_revenue

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_qty AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name AS supplier_name,
    pq.total_quantity
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN
    part_qty pq ON p.p_partkey = pq.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql2:

SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(line_revenue) AS revenue

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, s.s_name, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
FROM part p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

sql2:
WITH ps_agg AS (
    SELECT ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey, SUM(ps.ps_supplycost * ps.ps_availqty) AS total_cost
    FROM partsupp ps
    GROUP BY ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT p.p_name, s.s_name, SUM(a.total_cost) AS total_cost
FROM ps_agg a
JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = a.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = a.ps_suppkey
GROUP BY p.p_name, s.s_name

sql1:
SELECT n.n_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM lineitem l
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
JOIN customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_suppkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo
        WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
    )
)
SELECT n.n_name, SUM(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM order_lines ol
JOIN supplier s ON ol.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT p_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM part
JOIN lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
WHERE lineitem.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND lineitem.l_shipdate <= '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_lines AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate <= '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT p.p_name, fl.revenue
FROM part p
JOIN filtered_lines fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
ORDER BY fl.revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p_brand, COUNT(*) AS supplier_count
FROM part p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY p_brand
ORDER BY supplier_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH brand_counts AS (
    SELECT p.p_brand,
           COUNT(*) AS supplier_count
    FROM partsupp ps
    INNER JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM supplier s WHERE s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey)
    GROUP BY p.p_brand
)
SELECT p_brand, supplier_count
FROM brand_counts
ORDER BY supplier_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    ps.ps_availqty,
    ps.ps_supplycost
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
WHERE
    ps.ps_availqty > 100
ORDER BY
    ps.ps_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_ps AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey, ps_availqty, ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp
    WHERE ps_availqty > 100
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    fps.ps_availqty,
    fps.ps_supplycost
FROM
    filtered_ps fps,
    part p,
    supplier s
WHERE
    p.p_partkey = fps.ps_partkey
    AND s.s_suppkey = fps.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    fps.ps_supplycost DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:

JOIN partsupp ON lineitem.l_partkey = partsupp.ps_partkey

GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:

    SELECT p.p_name, l.l_extendedprice
    FROM part p
    JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
)
SELECT p_name, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_sales
FROM part_lineitem
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, sum(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
),
order_lines AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, l.l_extendedprice, l.l_discount
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM filtered_orders fo WHERE fo.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey)
)
SELECT p.p_name, sum(ol.l_extendedprice * (1 - ol.l_discount)) AS revenue

ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM part
JOIN lineitem ON p_partkey = l_partkey
JOIN orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
)
SELECT p_name, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM lineitem
JOIN filtered_orders ON l_orderkey = o_orderkey
JOIN part ON l_partkey = p_partkey
GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey AND s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
WHERE l.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH revenue_cte AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < '1997-12-31'
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM partsupp ps
          WHERE ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
            AND ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
      )
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
)
SELECT p.p_name, r.total_revenue
FROM part p
JOIN revenue_cte r ON p.p_partkey = r.l_partkey
ORDER BY r.total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p_name, 
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part
JOIN 
    lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
JOIN 
    orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    orders.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND orders.o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1997-12-31'
),
filtered_lineitems AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, l_extendedprice, l_discount
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_orderkey IN (SELECT o_orderkey FROM filtered_orders)
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.l_extendedprice * (1 - fl.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    filtered_lineitems fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p_brand, COUNT(*) AS supplier_count, AVG(ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost
FROM partsupp
JOIN part ON partsupp.ps_partkey = part.p_partkey
JOIN supplier ON partsupp.ps_suppkey = supplier.s_suppkey
GROUP BY p_brand
ORDER BY supplier_count DESC;
sql2:
WITH brand_data AS (
    SELECT p.p_brand,
           ps.ps_supplycost
    FROM partsupp ps,
         part p,
         supplier s
    WHERE ps.ps_partkey = p.p_partkey
      AND ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT p_brand,
       COUNT(*) AS supplier_count,
       AVG(ps_supplycost) AS average_supply_cost
FROM brand_data
GROUP BY p_brand
ORDER BY supplier_count DESC;

sql1:
SELECT n.n_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM nation n
JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
JOIN lineitem l ON ps.ps_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE o.o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o.o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
sql2:
WITH filtered_orders AS (
    SELECT o_orderkey
    FROM orders
    WHERE o_orderdate >= '1997-01-01' AND o_orderdate < '1998-01-01'
),
revenue AS (
    SELECT s.s_nationkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS rev
    FROM lineitem l
    INNER JOIN filtered_orders fo ON l.l_orderkey = fo.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN partsupp ps ON l.l_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
    INNER JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
)
SELECT n.n_name,
       SUM(r.rev) AS total_revenue
FROM nation n
INNER JOIN revenue r ON n.n_nationkey = r.s_nationkey
GROUP BY n.n_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

sql1:

    WHERE l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < '1997-02-01'
)
SELECT p_name, SUM(line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM part

GROUP BY p_name
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue 
FROM lineitem 
WHERE l_shipdate BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31' 
GROUP BY l_orderkey 
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH shipped_items AS (
    SELECT l_orderkey, l_extendedprice
    FROM lineitem
    WHERE l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate <= '1997-12-31'
)
SELECT l_orderkey, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS total_revenue
FROM shipped_items
GROUP BY l_orderkey
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue 
FROM part p 
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
GROUP BY p.p_name 
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_revenue AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    GROUP BY l.l_partkey
    ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
    LIMIT 10
)
SELECT p.p_name, pr.total_revenue
FROM part_revenue pr
JOIN part p ON p.p_partkey = pr.l_partkey
ORDER BY pr.total_revenue DESC;

sql1:
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name, s.s_name
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH supplier_parts AS (
    SELECT
        ps.ps_partkey,
        ps.ps_suppkey,
        SUM(ps.ps_availqty) AS total_available_quantity
    FROM
        partsupp ps
    GROUP BY
        ps.ps_partkey, ps.ps_suppkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    s.s_name,
    sp.total_available_quantity
FROM
    supplier_parts sp
JOIN
    part p ON p.p_partkey = sp.ps_partkey
JOIN
    supplier s ON s.s_suppkey = sp.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY
    total_available_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, s.s_name, ps.ps_availqty 
FROM part p 
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN supplier s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey 
WHERE ps.ps_availqty > 100 
ORDER BY p.p_name;
sql2:
WITH ps_filtered AS (
    SELECT ps_partkey, ps_suppkey, ps_availqty
    FROM partsupp
    WHERE ps_availqty > 100
)
SELECT p.p_name, s.s_name, pf.ps_availqty
FROM ps_filtered pf, part p, supplier s
WHERE p.p_partkey = pf.ps_partkey
  AND s.s_suppkey = pf.ps_suppkey
ORDER BY p.p_name;

sql1:
SELECT p.p_name, SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS total_sales
FROM part p
JOIN lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
GROUP BY p.p_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH line_agg AS (
    SELECT l_partkey, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS total_sales
    FROM lineitem
    GROUP BY l_partkey
)
SELECT p.p_name, la.total_sales
FROM part p
JOIN line_agg la ON p.p_partkey = la.l_partkey
ORDER BY la.total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_partkey, 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey 
WHERE 
    l.l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l.l_shipdate < '1997-02-01' 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_partkey, p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        l_partkey,
        SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS revenue
    FROM
        lineitem
    WHERE
        l_shipdate >= '1997-01-01' AND l_shipdate < '1997-02-01'
    GROUP BY
        l_partkey
)
SELECT
    p.p_partkey,
    p.p_name,
    pr.revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    part_revenue pr ON p.p_partkey = pr.l_partkey
ORDER BY
    pr.revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name,
    SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)) AS revenue
FROM 
    part p
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON p.p_partkey = l.l_partkey
JOIN 
    supplier s ON l.l_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN 
    nation n ON s.s_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
WHERE 
    n.n_name = 'Germany'
    AND l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH german_suppliers AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey
    FROM supplier s
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM nation n
        WHERE n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
          AND n.n_name = 'Germany'
    )
),
filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT l.l_partkey,
           l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS line_revenue
    FROM lineitem l
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1996-01-01'
      AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1997-01-01'
      AND l.l_suppkey IN (SELECT gs.s_suppkey FROM german_suppliers gs)
)
SELECT
    p.p_name,
    SUM(fl.line_revenue) AS revenue
FROM
    part p
JOIN
    filtered_lineitem fl ON p.p_partkey = fl.l_partkey
GROUP BY
    p.p_name
ORDER BY
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql1:
SELECT 
    p.p_name, 
    SUM(l.l_quantity) AS total_quantity, 
    AVG(l.l_extendedprice) AS avg_price 
FROM 
    part p 
JOIN 
    partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey 
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey 
GROUP BY 
    p.p_name 
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC 
LIMIT 10;
sql2:
WITH part_lineitem AS (
    SELECT
        p.p_name,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice
    FROM
        lineitem l
    JOIN
        partsupp ps ON ps.ps_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    JOIN
        part p ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
)
SELECT
    p_name,
    SUM(l_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price
FROM
    part_lineitem
GROUP BY
    p_name
ORDER BY
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 10;
